text: Darling Harbour, Port Jackson, and coastal sandstone headlands are clues to this Australian city. It is a major harbor metropolis with ferries, beaches, and a large role in the country's cultural life. What city is this?

Lake Titicaca, the Yungas, and a high-altitude administrative capital are clues to this landlocked South American country. Its geography includes Andean plateaus and Amazonian lowlands. What country is this?

The Great Rift Valley, highland coffee regions, and churches carved from rock at Lalibela are clues to this African country. It has a long imperial history and never became a typical European colony. What country is this?

The Sutton Hoo helmet, Old English poetry, and small kingdoms such as Mercia are clues to this early medieval people. They shaped language and rulership in England before later Norman rule. What group is this?

Saga traditions, longships, and settlements from Greenland to the British Isles are clues to this seafaring people. They raided, traded, and colonized across northern Europe in the early medieval period. What people are these?

The Tennis Court Oath, Estates-General, and storming of a royal prison are clues to this upheaval. It challenged monarchy and privilege while reshaping political language across Europe. What revolution is this?

Covalent bonding, carbon skeletons, and reactions involving functional groups are clues to this branch of chemistry. It studies many molecules found in fuels, medicines, plastics, and living organisms. What field is this?

Kepler's laws, telescopic observation, and objects beyond Earth's atmosphere are clues to this science. It studies planets, stars, galaxies, and the physical structure of the universe. What field is this?
Stalactites, stalagmites, and slow mineral deposition in limestone caves are clues to this chemical compound. It forms shells, chalk, and much of limestone. What substance is this?
A sliding stone, a target area, and teammates brushing the ice are clues to this winter sport. Players try to guide heavy stones into scoring position through touch and strategy. What sport is this?
A pommel horse, uneven bars, and floor routines are clues to this sport. Athletes combine strength, flexibility, balance, and controlled movement in judged events. What sport is this?
An oche, a numbered circular board, and finishes like double top are clues to this target sport. Players throw small pointed missiles to reduce a score toward exactly zero. What sport is this?

A yellow family, a fictional town with a nuclear plant, and long-running satirical episodes are clues to this animated television series. It comments on American life through exaggerated comedy. What series is this?
A time-traveling DeLorean, a lightning plan, and an eccentric inventor are clues to this film. Its story follows a teenager accidentally sent to an earlier version of his own town. What film is this?
A moonlit bicycle flight, a stranded visitor, and a child hiding a secret companion are clues to this film. Its story mixes suburban life with wonder, fear, and friendship. What film is this?
Thin rice noodles, tamarind, fish sauce, peanuts, and stir-fried egg are clues to this Thai dish. It balances sweet, sour, salty, and nutty flavors in a street-food format. What dish is this?
Basil, pine nuts, garlic, olive oil, and grated cheese are clues to this green sauce. It is traditionally linked to Ligurian cooking and often served with pasta. What sauce is this?
Seaweed broth, tofu, and fermented soybean paste are clues to this soup. It is served in many Japanese meals and can vary by region, season, and household style. What soup is this?
Touch input, a large glass screen, and mobile apps are clues to this portable computer. It is larger than a phone but usually smaller and lighter than a laptop. What device is this?

Pull requests, repositories, and issue tracking are clues to this code-hosting platform. Developers use it to share projects, review changes, and collaborate around version-controlled software. What platform is this?
Tables, rows, columns, and queries are clues to this organized data system. It stores information so applications can search, update, and manage records efficiently. What is this?
Borrowed words, blended words, and new coinages are clues to this vocabulary category. It refers to a newly created or newly popular expression within a language. What is it called?
A word that sounds like what it describes, such as buzz or hiss, is a clue to this linguistic device. It connects sound shape with meaning in a direct, memorable way. What is it called?
Pitch, stress, rhythm, and intonation across a sentence are clues to this feature of speech. It shapes how utterances sound beyond individual consonants and vowels. What is it called?

Water lilies, loose brushwork, and changing light across repeated scenes are clues to this painter. His work helped define a movement focused on visual impression rather than sharp academic detail. Who is this?
Dreamlike melting clocks, precise illusionistic surfaces, and Surrealist imagery are clues to this painter. His public persona became almost as recognizable as his strange visual worlds. Who is this?

A lonely creature, an ambitious scientist, and a frame narrative in the Arctic are clues to this novel. It explores creation, responsibility, and social rejection through Gothic fiction. What novel is this?
A glass tube, a vacuum, and a glowing filament are clues to this older lighting device. It produces light by heating a thin wire until it shines. What object is this?
A wheel, a rope, and a change in pulling direction are clues to this simple machine. It can help lift loads by redirecting force or sharing weight across multiple supports. What machine is this?

Two lenses, a stage, and magnifying tiny specimens are clues to this scientific instrument. It lets users observe cells, fibers, crystals, and other details too small for the naked eye. What instrument is this?

Karst towers, red soil basins, and the Guilin landscape are clues to this Chinese river. It is famous for scenic limestone formations and has long been depicted in poetry and painting. What river is this?

The Deccan Plateau, monsoon-dependent agriculture, and the Western Ghats are clues to this large peninsula. It projects into the Indian Ocean and shapes climate patterns across South Asia. What peninsula is this?

Subduction along the Peru-Chile Trench, altiplano uplift, and volcanic arcs are clues to this mountain range. It forms a long western spine of South America and strongly shapes climate and settlement. What range is this?

Knossos, Linear A, and palace complexes on Crete are clues to this Bronze Age civilization. Its art and architecture suggest maritime trade networks across the eastern Mediterranean. What civilization is this?
Ashoka's edicts, a capital at Pataliputra, and administration over much of the Indian subcontinent are clues to this ancient empire. It followed the rise of Magadha power. What empire is this?

Guilds, cathedral towns, and fortified manors are clues to this European period. It sits between antiquity and the early modern world and is often framed through feudal obligations. What period is this?
Introns, exons, and removal of noncoding sequences are clues to this RNA-processing step. It helps convert a primary transcript into a mature messenger RNA molecule. What process is this?

Plate boundaries, mantle convection, and continental drift are clues to this geoscience theory. It explains earthquakes, mountain building, seafloor spreading, and the movement of continents. What theory is this?

Rayleigh scattering, atmospheric molecules, and wavelength-dependent diffusion are clues to this color phenomenon. It explains why clear daytime skies are dominated by shorter visible wavelengths. What color is this?
The maillot jaune, mountain stages, and time trials are clues to this cycling race. It is contested over multiple weeks and rewards both endurance and team tactics. What race is this?
Stones, guards, draws, and hammer advantage are clues to this ice sport strategy. Teams score by placing objects closest to a target area after all shots are played. What sport is this?
A piste, a foil, and right-of-way conventions in some weapon categories are clues to this combat sport. Athletes score by landing touches with controlled blade work and footwork. What sport is this?

A rotating hallway fight, dream layers, and a planted idea are clues to this science-fiction thriller. Its plot turns on whether constructed realities can influence decisions after waking. What film is this?
A wasteland convoy, practical stunt work, and a rebel driver named Furiosa are clues to this action film. Its visual rhythm is built around pursuit, scarcity, and survival. What film is this?

A plumber's jump arc, side-scrolling level design, and power-ups hidden in blocks are clues to this video game character. He became one of the most recognizable mascots in console history. Who is this?
Nixtamalized corn dough, fillings, and wrapping in corn husks or banana leaves are clues to this Mesoamerican dish. It is often steamed and served during celebrations. What dish is this?

Raw fish, coconut milk, lime, and Polynesian island foodways are clues to this dish. Its name varies by region, but the preparation combines seafood with bright acidity and richness. What dish is this?
Long fermentation, cabbage, chili, and lactic acid bacteria are clues to this Korean food. It appears as a side dish and also as an ingredient in soups, pancakes, and fried rice. What food is this?

Packets, routing tables, and best-effort delivery are clues to this network protocol. It provides addressing across interconnected networks but does not by itself guarantee delivery. What protocol is this?

Virtual machines, object storage, and pay-as-you-go infrastructure are clues to this computing model. It lets organizations rent scalable resources instead of owning all hardware locally. What model is this?
Linked lists, hashes, and proof-based consensus are clues to this distributed ledger technology. It stores records in blocks that are difficult to alter retroactively. What technology is this?
Subject-object-verb order, case particles, and honorific levels are clues to this language. Its writing system combines logographic characters with two syllabaries. What language is this?

Clicks, noun classes, and Bantu grammatical structure are clues to this southern African language. It is widely associated with South Africa and has a name beginning with a distinctive consonant cluster. What language is this?

Classical grammar, Buddhist texts, and the Devanagari writing tradition are clues to this ancient language. It has influenced many South Asian languages and religious literatures. What language is this?

Stream of consciousness, a single day in Dublin, and dense literary allusion are clues to this modernist novel. Its structure reworks an ancient epic through ordinary urban experience. What novel is this?
Pointed arches, rib vaults, and flying buttresses are clues to this architectural style. It shaped many medieval cathedrals and used height and light for dramatic effect. What style is this?

Improvised solos, swing rhythm, and blue notes are clues to this musical genre. It grew from African American musical traditions and became a major influence on modern popular music. What genre is this?
A blade set in a frame, shaving thin layers, and flattening wood are clues to this hand tool. It is used in carpentry to smooth surfaces or adjust thickness precisely. What tool is this?

An inclined scale, sliding weights, and counterbalancing unknown mass are clues to this measuring device. It was common in laboratories and schools before digital scales became dominant. What device is this?
Interlocking teeth, torque transfer, and changes in rotational speed are clues to this machine part. It appears in clocks, bicycles, cars, and many mechanical devices. What part is this?
